name: saxotrader
description: Saxo Bank OpenAPI integration for Claude Code — live prices, instrument resolution, portfolio positions, and account info. Not an official Saxo plugin. This is a private project.

plugins.name: saxotrader
plugins.description: Live prices, instrument lookup, and portfolio data from your Saxo account. Unofficial MIT-licensed project — not affiliated with Saxo Bank A/S. Read-only, no order placement.
